##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Danielle Sotomayor and Keith Wentz
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregates of parallel pale blue thin bladed crystals, associated with blue to dark blue tabular antipinite

##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R160084
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
